subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.SL.TZ2.1
question_html:
How many moles of magnesium hydroxide are produced with 0.50 mol of ammonia?

Mg3N2 (s) + 6H2O (l) → 3Mg(OH)2 (aq) + 2NH3 (aq)

A. 0.25

B. 0.33

C. 0.75

D. 1.5
examiners_html: This was one of the easier questions on the paper. 79 % of the candidates were able to deduce the amount of a product given the amount of another product and the balanced equation.
